inputs.name: closeOnEscapeKey
inputs.description: Whether the product switch should close when the escape key is pressed.

inputs.name: closeOnOutsideClick
inputs.description: Whether the product switch should close when a click is made outside its boundaries.

inputs.name: disableScrollbar
inputs.description: Whether to wrap content with fd-scrollbar directive.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the product switch is disabled.

inputs.name: focusAutoCapture
inputs.description: Whether the product switch should automatically move focus into the trapped region.

inputs.name: focusTrapped
inputs.description: Whether the product switch should trap focus within its boundaries.

inputs.name: isOpen
inputs.description: Two-way binding for product switch open state.

inputs.name: noArrow
inputs.description: Whether the product switch dropdown should have an arrow.

inputs.name: placement
inputs.description: Placement of the product switch dropdown.

inputs.name: triggers
inputs.description: The trigger events that will open/close the product switch.

outputs.name: beforeOpen
outputs.description: Event emitted right before the product switch is being opened.

outputs.name: isOpenChange
outputs.description: Two-way binding for product switch open state.
